name: python3-multidict
title: python3-multidict
description:
multidict implementation (Python library)
Multidicts are useful for working with HTTP headers, URL query args etc.
.
HTTP Headers and URL query string require specific data structure:
multidict. It behaves mostly like a dict but it can have
several values for the same key.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-multidict because multidict implementation (Python library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-multidict as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-multidict with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-multidict --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
